threats.title: Weak admin password / config tampering
threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation: Change default admin password + keep firmware updated

threats.title: Deauthentication Flood
threats.mitigation: Enable client isolation + AP rate limiting; use modern router firmware

threats.title: Evil Twin
threats.description: Default SSID or weak management password
threats.mitigation:
Use WPA3-Enterprise or certificate-based auth; enable 802.1X
disable SSID broadcast

threats.title: Deauthentication Flood
threats.mitigation:
Enable client isolation 
 rate limiting on router

threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation:
Disable open networks 
use guest SSID for visitors
